Document:
# Rule 5 – Team Antagonists must work with their team You are a team antagonist if the game tells you you're a team antagonist in your character menu. You may not intentionally harm, hinder, or go against your fellow team antagonists, you have a goal that's much easier to complete with your team. You should listen to your team leader.
This does not mean that separate teams of antagonists must work together. (i.e. 2 separate teams of nuclear operatives.)
Examples of team antagonists include: - Nuclear Operatives - Zombies - Dragon (Space Carp) - Revolutionaries - Terror Spiders
